nodes.label: Provider Timeouts (bounded per-call)
nodes.rationale: SDK defaults are often unbounded; an explicit request timeout per operation makes a hung upstream fail fast with 504-style mapping instead of hanging the gateway.

nodes.label: Bounded Retries with Backoff
nodes.rationale: Retry only idempotent transient failures (timeouts, 429, 5xx) with exponential backoff + jitter and capped attempts; never retry 4xx or partially streamed responses; respect Retry-After. Retries apply only to the connection/first-token phase of streams.

nodes.label: Circuit Breaker per (provider, credential)
nodes.rationale: Open after N consecutive failures for a cooldown, fail fast (503) instead of hammering a dead upstream, half-open probe to recover. Deferred until complex routing endpoints land, where isolating providers under load matters more. Minimal in-house policy preferred over a new dependency.
